LanguageData.HornedSpectre_Blood.label: 血液
LanguageData.HornedSpectreA.label: 受唤孽物
LanguageData.HornedSpectreA.description: 它活着？还是死的？关于这些可怕的东西从哪儿来，我们一点头绪也没有。
LanguageData.HornedSpectreA.tools.left_hand.label: 左拳
LanguageData.HornedSpectreA.tools.right_hand.label: 右拳
LanguageData.HornedSpectreA.tools.teeth.label: 牙齿
